goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and should be in the 'north'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '5 people' and '4 nights' starting from 'sunday'.
If the booking fails how about 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'italian' food and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '11:00' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should be in the north
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 5 people and 4 nights starting from sunday
If the booking fails how about tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve italian food and should be in the same area as the hotel
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 11:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
